title: QIAGEN HotStarTaq PCR
description: QIAGEN HotStarTaq DNA Polymerase: 50 uL hot-start reaction requiring a 95 C / 15 min activation.

payload.notes: Vendor: QIAGEN, HotStarTaq DNA Polymerase (Cat. 203203). REQUIRED initial activation: 95 C for 15 min (do not shorten; this releases the hot-start enzyme). Setup here is scaled to 50 uL from QIAGEN's 100 uL handbook table (the vendor states components scale proportionally; the 15 min activation is fixed regardless of volume). Annealing: ~5 C below the primer Tm, 50-68 C range. The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Cycles 25-35. Extension 1 min/kb at 72 C. For GC-rich or structured templates add 5X Q-Solution to 1X. Template <= 1 ug. Reactions can be set up at room temperature. Source: QIAGEN HotStarTaq DNA Polymerase Quick-Start Protocol and HotStarTaq PCR Handbook (https://www.qiagen.com/HB-0452)
